visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on a television screen mounted on a dark, textured wall. In the foreground, the out-of-focus back of a person's head is visible, suggesting they are watching the TV. On the screen, a news report is playing. Initially, a blurry, shaky shot shows what appears to be a crime scene with police tape. Text in Chinese and English, "POLICE LINE DO NOT CROSS," is visible on the screen. The image then cuts to a man in a suit and tie, presumably a news anchor, speaking directly to the camera. The Chinese text "風行網" is displayed in the upper left corner of the frame. A female narrator speaks in a clear, formal, and serious tone, delivering a news report with a steady and somber pace. Her voice is filled with gravity as she announces, "警务处处长发表声明，对黄志诚警司的死表示沉重的哀悼，并且..." (The Commissioner of Police has issued a statement, expressing deep condolences for the death of Inspector Wong Chi-cheng, and also...). The audio is clean, with no background music or sound effects, placing all the focus on the solemn and important news being conveyed.
